TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Sirakesay, title = Sirakesay, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Sirakesay} }

S.FORM: alang Sirakesay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,845 buwan, 4,720 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 486 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 4,234 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 8%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sirakesay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sirakesay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sirakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sirakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sirakesay hya' ga Ciripunan. tay 'llaw na Sirakesay hya' ga Sarad. tay 'zil na Sirakesay hya' ga Cikasuwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh

alang Sirakesay ga niya mki sku Karing Keng atu Ci'an go, kwara sali buwan nya ga 1,845 buwan, 4,720 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 10% kyan ku 486 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 90% kyan ku 4,234 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Amis 8%, Truku 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran, ngasal psatu tegami ru pqniqan iyu. rhzyal kki'an tay 'llaw na Sirakesay hya' ga bsilung. tay 'zil na Sirakesay hya' ga rgyax. tay mkyahu' na Sirakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Sirakesay hya' ga llyung. tay mkyahu' na Sirakesay hya' ga Ciripunan. tay 'llaw na Sirakesay hya' ga Sarad. tay 'zil na Sirakesay hya' ga Cikasuwan. rekisi kayal kyokay ssquliq pinlpgan ppqbaqan pqwasan biru 'laqi' cikuy pqwasan biru 'laqi' mrkyas tuqi 'san basu kisya' glgan spyangan na pinbahu Ubuy qqmayh
S.PHON: alaŋ s~ɕirakes~ɕaj ɣa nija mki s~ɕku kariŋ keŋ atu ʦ~ʨiʔan ɣo, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *,*** βuwan, *,*** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *,*** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, amis~ɕ *%, truku *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran, ŋas~ɕal ps~ɕatu teɣami ru pqniqan iju. rħzjal kkiʔan taj ʔllaw na s~ɕirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa βs~ɕiluŋ. taj ʔzil na s~ɕirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na s~ɕirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkjaħuʔ na s~ɕirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨiripunan. taj ʔllaw na s~ɕirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa s~ɕara*. taj ʔzil na s~ɕirakes~ɕaj ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨikas~ɕuwan. rekis~ɕi kajal kjokaj s~ɕs~ɕquliq pinlpɣan ppqβaqan pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ ʦ~ʨikuj pqwas~ɕan βiru ʔlaqiʔ mrkjas~ɕ tuqi ʔs~ɕan βas~ɕu kis~ɕjaʔ ɣlɣan s~ɕpjaŋan na pinβaħu uβuj qqmajħ
